candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue label; matches total shipping income amounts and is the standard revenue line.
Component of revenue specific to pool arrangements; not the main consolidated top-line, so kept as secondary if ever used alone.
Appears to be an alternative label for total revenue equal to 'Revenue'; used as fallback if 'Revenue' is missing in some years.
Non-operating income, not core revenue; should not be used for REVT except as last resort, and other better labels exist.
Financial income, not operating revenue; not appropriate for REVT while true revenue lines exist.
Interest component of finance income, not operating revenue; excluded for REVT.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Represents net income, not revenue; conceptually wrong for REVT.
Represents comprehensive income, not revenue; not suitable for REVT.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income (expense) for the period
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not revenue; inappropriate for REVT.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement revenue; not appropriate for REVT.
Liability, not revenue; not suitable for REVT.

variables.notes: Revenue and Total shipping income show identical totals, indicating alternative labels for the same top-line figure. Revenue is chosen as primary, with Total shipping income as fallback per the revenue priority rule.

candidates.why: Direct input costs; clearly part of cost of goods/services sold.
Direct voyage-related costs in a shipping business; core component of COGS.
Ongoing operating costs of vessels directly tied to generating shipping revenue; treated as COGS in this industry context.
Costs of chartering vessels, directly related to revenue generation; appropriate COGS component.
Overhead SG&A, not direct production cost; should be excluded from COGS.
Additional G&A overhead, not direct COGS; excluded.
Likely broader operating overhead bucket rather than strictly direct costs; better categorized under SG&A components.
Non-operating by label; should not be included in COGS.
Explicitly non-operating; inappropriate for COGS.
Not clearly direct to shipping operations here and may be part of overhead; less appropriate than voyage/vessel costs for COGS.
Balance sheet liability, not an income statement COGS line; excluded.

variables.notes: Selected direct shipping-related operating cost lines and direct material inputs as COGS components, excluding G&A and non-operating lines.

candidates.why: This is an income line (negative expenses), not SG&A expense; should not be used for SG&A components.
Direct operational costs tied to revenue (COGS) rather than overhead SG&A; excluded from SG&A.
Canonical SG&A overhead bucket; primary SG&A component.
Additional detail of G&A overhead; appropriate SG&A component.
Explicitly SG&A-related stock-based compensation; should be included in SG&A components.
Likely captures miscellaneous operating overhead beyond COGS; appropriate as an SG&A bucket given lack of more specific breakdown.
Share-based compensation, typically included within SG&A; should be part of SG&A components.
Explicit SG&A line; even if values are nan in preview, row presence means it may have historical data and should be included.

variables.notes: Included all identifiable SG&A and overhead-related expense components, excluding vessel operating expenses (treated as COGS) and excluding the income line 'Other operating income' per SG&A rules.

No research and development related line items (e.g., R&D, research, development costs) appear in the provided Income Statement or Balance Sheet previews; XRD is treated as structurally absent and thus set to 0.

candidates.why: Net finance cost line (income minus expenses). Useful fallback if detailed interest expense lines are missing for some periods.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense on financial liabilities measured at amortised cost
candidates.why: Primary specific interest expense on financial liabilities; best representation of interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest component of lease liabilities; specific interest expense line and part of total interest cost.

candidates.row_label: Fair value adjustment on interest rate swaps
candidates.why: Derivative fair value movements, not pure interest expense; lower priority but related to financing costs.
Represents profit attributable to minority interests, not interest expense; should NOT be used for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; can serve as an alternative label over time.
Balance sheet liability, not period interest expense; excluded as primary XINT measure.
Equity classification, not interest expense; not suitable for XINT.
Disclosure about lease interest but not clearly the income statement expense line; less direct than the IS interest expense rows.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expense on financial liabilities measured at amortised cost
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Ordered XINT as a priority list: first the main interest expense on financial liabilities, then lease interest, then its supplemental disclosure, and finally the net finance expenses as a fallback when detailed rows are unavailable.

candidates.row_label: Loss on disposal of investments in equity accounted investees
candidates.why: Income statement loss/gain item, not an equity balance; not suitable for BE.

candidates.row_label: Share of profit (loss) of equity accounted investees (net of  income tax)
candidates.why: Equity method income, not the equity balance; not used for BE.

candidates.row_label: Share of profit (loss) of equity accounted investees (net of)
candidates.why: Same as above, income statement item; not equity balance.

candidates.row_label: Equity-accounted investees - share of other comprehensive income
candidates.why: OCI share, not a balance sheet equity total; inappropriate for BE.
Expense/OCI item, not total equity; excluded for BE.

candidates.row_label: Amounts Due to Equity-Accounted Joint Ventures
candidates.why: Liability to JVs, not equity; not BE.
Unclear small equity component; BE should use the full equity attributable to owners if available.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the Company
candidates.why: Explicit book equity attributable to parent shareholders; ideal measure for BE, excluding non-controlling interests per instructions.
Total equity including any non-controlling interests; only used if owners’ equity unavailable, which is not the case here.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the Company

variables.notes: Used the explicit parent/owner equity line to avoid double-counting non-controlling interests, as required by the BE + MIB construction.

candidates.why: Represents the amount of profit or loss attributable to non-controlling interests; best available proxy for minority interest in absence of a balance sheet NCI line.
Alternative label for non-controlling interests in profit; similar concept and values to 'Non-controlling interest'.

variables.notes: No explicit balance sheet line for non-controlling interests is shown, so the income statement non-controlling interest lines are used as the best available measures of minority interest, provided as a priority list.
